title: Variant Crafting Tables
description: Crafting Tables made from all wood types
body:
Variant Crafting tables adds a new Crafting Table for each available Plank type added to your game
(where support has been provided)

  • All textures have been compressed (without any negative impact) to keep the mod file size to an absolute minimum.
  • All textures are manually created using the the appropriate planks to ensure they look correct.
  • Fabric load conditions have been used to ensure your console is not full of errors when compatible mods are not installed.
    • It has also been used to stop any duplicate crafting tables appearing, for example : if Better Nether is installed the Warped & Crimson crafting tables are disabled.
  • Un-crafting for all variants back to vanilla has been included in case of any issues.
  • Vanilla crafting renamed to Oak and recoloured slightly to better fit the oak wood type.

 



 

  • Variant Barrels - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/variant-barrels-fabric
  • Variant Bookshelves - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/variant-bookshelves-fabric
  • Variant Composters - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/variant-composters-fabric
  • Variant Grindstones - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/variant-grindstones-fabric
  • Variant Lanterns - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/variant-lanterns-fabric
  • Variant Shields - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/variant-tiered-shields-fabric
  • Variant Sticks & Stuff - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/variant-sticks-stuff
  • Variant Weapons & Tools - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/variant-weapons-tools-fabric


 

 

If you are looking for a similar mod on forge, check out : 
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/variant-crafting-tables
